meaning: n.适口的食物,美味;adj.秀丽的,优美的,讲究的,挑剔的,适口的
examples: After a dainty egg and fish dinner, Tom said he wanted to learn to smoke, now.
I should never have thought, dear boy of mine, that you were so dainty and fussy about your food.
The girls were dainty and feminine.
At the signal everyone scooped up a dainty measure of sand and paused for the cameras.
From birth our daughters are praised for looking dainty and our sons for being strong.
